assumptions: The question concerns consolidated financial statements.
The intragroup dividend gives rise to a foreign-currency-denominated receivable or payable after declaration.

approaches.label: Hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes IFRS 9 hedge accounting requirements on eligible hedged items in consolidated financial statements, including the treatment of intragroup foreign currency exposures.

approaches.label: Foreign currency translation accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes IAS 21 accounting for exchange differences on monetary items and their presentation in consolidated financial statements when hedge accounting is not applied.
